The all-in-one
 team communication app
Send messages and files to team members, easily find them with unlimited messages history, and start video conferencing with one click.
Try Pumble - itâs free!
WATCH VIDEO (8:02)
Your team communication hub
        Start channels, share documents, organize video calls, and invite partners to collaborate.
    
Seamless communication
Messages
            Send 1-on-1 and group messages.
        
Channels
            Organize work conversation by topic.
        
Thread
            Spin-off discussions into threads.
        
Files
            Share files, images, and links with team.
        
Productive meetings
Video conferencing
            Organize video meetings with teammates.
        
Voice calls
            Have a quick call with others.
        
Meeting links
            Create a link and send it to anyone.
        
Screen sharing
            Present demos and provide support.
        
Collaborative teamwork
Unlimited search
            Find any message, whenever it happened.
        
Guests
            Give limited access to external people.
        
Notifications
            Stay updated, mute when you need focus.
        
Mentions
            Get attention in group discussions.
        
Packed with Useful Features
        From integrations to security, Pumble has everything a modern team needs.
    
Integrations
External Guests

Integrations
Integrate with different apps so you can collaborate from one place.
Learn more
External Guests
Simplify the way you collaborate with external guests and invite them to a Pumble meeting even if they donât have a Pumble account.
Learn more
Connect AI agents
Use Pumbleâs MCP server to optimize collaboration with AI agents. Summarize conversations, find lost files, automate updates, and much more.
Learn more
Scheduling
Schedule your message to be sent when you want it, and donât risk forgetting about it, without bothering anyone outside their work hours.
Learn more
Voice messages
Sending voice notes in Pumble instead of text and increase your efficiency.  Share ideas and updates, or just say hello to your teammates.
Learn more
Video messages
Instead of scheduling a meeting, record a video message covering the information you want to share.
Learn more
Permissions
Set up different workspaces and channel permissions within your workspace.
Learn more

llm_raw.description: A comprehensive team communication and collaboration platform featuring persistent messaging, channels, video/voice conferencing, and file sharing.
llm_raw.notes: Pumble explicitly markets an MCP server, indicating native support for AI agent integrations.
